name: Bitget
description: Bitget is a cryptocurrency exchange and copy trading platform offering REST and WebSocket APIs for spot trading, futures (USDT-M, USDC-M, and Coin-M perpetual contracts), margin trading, copy trading, broker services, and earn products.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Spot Trading API
itemListElement.description: REST API for spot trading on Bitget including market data, order management, account queries, wallet operations, and sub-account management.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Futures Trading API
itemListElement.description: REST API for USDT-M, USDC-M, and Coin-M perpetual futures contracts including market data, position management, order execution, trigger orders, and VIP fee rate queries.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Copy Trading API
itemListElement.description: REST API for copy trading functionality covering futures copy trade and spot copy trade, including trader order tracking and profit summary endpoints for both leaders and followers.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Broker API
itemListElement.description: REST API for non-disclosed brokers to build independent trading platforms on top of Bitget infrastructure, including sub-account creation, API key management, commission tracking, and permission control.

itemListElement.name: Bitget WebSocket API
itemListElement.description: Real-time WebSocket API providing public and private channels for market data (tickers, candles, order book depth, trades) and private account events (orders, positions, balances) for spot and futures markets.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Earn API
itemListElement.description: REST API for Bitget Earn products including staking, savings, and other yield-generating products available on the platform.

itemListElement.name: Bitget Margin Trading API
itemListElement.description: REST API for cross and isolated margin trading on Bitget, enabling leveraged spot trading with account management, borrowing, and order execution endpoints.
